nodes.label: Immutable Ledger Principle (INSERT ONLY)
nodes.rationale: Financial and inventory transaction data must never be updated or deleted. Corrections use Storno (reverse entries) or adjustment records to maintain full audit trail — mandatory for K-IFRS and SAP ERP compliance.

nodes.label: Supabase Usage Policy (Dashboard Only)
nodes.rationale: Airtable is the single source of truth for WMS/TMS operational data. Supabase is only permitted for dashboard snapshot/aggregate data in sincerely-scm-dashboard sub-project to avoid data duplication and inconsistency risks.

nodes.label: Agent Routing Priority (SK > D-TMS > D > Built-in)
nodes.rationale: Fine-grained operational agents (SK-01~09) take priority over TMS strategy agents (D-TMS1/D-TMS2), domain experts (D1/D2/D3), and built-in tools to ensure precise domain handling and avoid routing conflicts.
